name: structure
description: Structural-element (SEL) visualization, one item type per element: structure-beam / structure-cable / structure-pile (line elements, carry the 'line' keyword) and structure-geogrid / structure-liner / structure-shell (surface elements, carry 'polygons'). 'contour <attribute>' maps forces/moments/resultants; 'label <type>' colours by group/model/state. 'structure-vector' draws nodal vectors.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Clip the item against the global model clip box.
Set the discrete colour list used for categorical colouring.
Colour entities by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute. See sub-item 'contour'.
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Categorical colour/label entities (group, model, state, id, ...). See sub-item 'label'.
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Configure node markers on the element.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Restrict categorical colouring to one group slot.
Choose the coordinate system used for component output.
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: contour
sub_items.description: Contour attributes for line elements (force/moment) and shells (resultants/stress).

sub_items.name: label
sub_items.description: Categorical colour SELs by group, model, id, type-element, plastic state, ...

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create structure-cable contour force legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour cable elements by axial force.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create structure-beam contour moment-bending legend active on
plot item create structure-shell contour resultants-mx legend active on
plot item create structure-liner label group legend active on

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
Line elements (beam/cable/pile) accept 'line'; surface elements (geogrid/liner/shell) accept 'polygons' — otherwise the top-level keyword set is identical.
structure-shell adds resultants-* and stress-elastic/plastic-* and coupling-* contour attributes that line elements do not have.
